message:
🐛 Add keyboard accessibility to clickable elements (#10870)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -149,8 +149,7 @@ export function DraftsTab({ {/* Actions */} - {/* eslint-disable-next-line jsx-a11y/click-events-have-key-events, jsx-a11y/no-static-element-interactions */} -
e.stopPropagation()}> +
e.stopPropagation()} onKeyDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}> {isConfirmingDelete ? ( <> {t('drafts.deleteThisDraft', 'Delete this draft?')} @@ -208,8 +207,7 @@ export function DraftsTab({ {recentlyDeletedOpen && ( showEmptyAllConfirm ? ( - /* eslint-disable-next-line jsx-a11y/click-events-have-key-events, jsx-a11y/no-static-element-interactions */ - e.stopPropagation()}> + e.stopPropagation()} onKeyDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}> {t('drafts.emptyAllConfirm', 'Remove all?')}
